description: You are a Solar Energy Systems Engineer at SunPath Solutions. A client has contracted your firm to design a rooftop PV system for their commercial building. The building model (Solar_Project.skp) is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with the Skelion plugin available. Review the client brief on the Desktop (client_brief.txt) for all project requirements. Design and document the full PV layout using Skelion, ensuring all specifications from the brief are met. Deliver the completed model and any reports specified in the brief.

data_sources.coordinates: Real GPS: 1 Harbor Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
data_sources.solar_resource: NREL PVWatts — San Francisco annual GHI
